sessionStart.bash: ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && mkdir -p "$ROOT/.groundcrew" && echo '{"started":"'$(date -u +%%Y-%%m-%%dT%%H:%%M:%%SZ)'","tasks_completed":0,"status":"active"}' > "$ROOT/.groundcrew/session.json" && echo "$ROOT" > "$HOME/.groundcrew-active-project"

sessionEnd.bash: ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); F="$ROOT/.groundcrew/session.json"; [ -f "$F" ] && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),f=process.argv[1],s=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));s.ended=new Date().toISOString();s.status='ended';fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(s,null,2));" "$F" || true

postToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName'); RESULT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolResult.resultType'); ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); [ -d "$ROOT/.groundcrew" ] && echo "$(date -u +%%Y-%%m-%%dT%%H:%%M:%%SZ),$TOOL,$RESULT" >> "$ROOT/.groundcrew/tool-history.csv" || true
